These are the hottest coding and technology topics right now

• AI Agents & Agentic Development 🚀
The biggest trend is moving beyond simple prompts to AI agents that can plan, write code, run tests, debug, and complete multi-step tasks autonomously. Many Medium articles are discussing “Agentic AI”, “AI coding agents”, and “loop engineering.”
Press enter or click to view image in full size

source : ChatgptIf not a Member Read From Here
2. AI-Assisted Coding
Developers are increasingly using AI tools as coding partners rather than just autocomplete tools. Articles about effective AI coding workflows, code review with AI, and AI productivity are highly popular.
3. TypeScript Dominance
TypeScript continues to gain momentum, especially for large-scale applications, AI tooling, and full-stack development. Many writers are discussing advanced TypeScript patterns, migration from JavaScript, and why TypeScript is becoming the default choice.
4. RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
Building AI applications with RAG remains one of the most-read topics. Developers want to connect LLMs to…
